title: Docs Task File
description: Task file produced by the analyze script for a single documentation page.

templatePath.description: Relative path from workspace root to the page template file.

docsPath.description: Relative path from workspace root to the target docs page.

status.description: missing = no docs page exists; outdated = page exists but fails checks; ok = all checks pass.

issues.description: List of specific issues found by analyze (empty when status is ok).

relatedSources.description: Source code files that are the ground truth for this page's content.
